text.message: i need to plow 1 of you

ye go for it if u want
but i think i need to do it

against blue you cant fight devs
rather take a bit of brick
ill just take what i thought at first
told you you are gonna loose on devs like this

red with no road comp and all res is scary
what would have been my win play then?
with low ore and no brick
and not a single 5 has rolled, which is my wheat
maybe you r right, i dno but i dont see it
I think black made the objective best move for themself and you’re letting the hurt of the plow cloud your judgment here
When you hit them with such accurate facts and logic that they have to log off the game entirely
and red is running away already
yeah 83 was clearly the wrong pick for both you and me
If black had picked 9 4 11 I think he’d be at 2 points rn
nah man for rolled so much more than 8
that was because of blue, something u cant predict, that was a bad decision from blue i guess
Oj I really think you’re being biased
yeh, i think orange u need to rather take a look on your own placement decision
well, i guess blue has something against me
I can help you pop oj
If you need that to pop
Black because you’re trying to take road I feel like I have to rob you
not planning that but i get u
u were quite asf when oj solod me
